justification: All 5 ACs implemented with correct HTTP codes and error codes (200, 409/EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE, 400/INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT, 404/USER_NOT_FOUND, 200 idempotent). AC5 same-email idempotency is distinctly handled from AC2 conflict check — short-circuits after findById without calling findByEmail or updateEmail. No external validation library — uses simple EMAIL_REGEX. 13 tests cover all 5 ACs with explicit names. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 5 ACs to specific test names. files_changed lists both handler and test file.

observations.text: AC5 idempotency correctly short-circuits before findByEmail, making the distinction from AC2 unambiguous
Guard ordering (format → existence → same-email → conflict → update) is well-reasoned and tested explicitly
No external dependencies — simple regex for AC3 as required
13 tests including 7 parameterised format-validation cases shows thorough coverage beyond minimum
acceptance_criteria_coverage is complete with specific test names for each AC

agent_output_excerpt:
13/13 green. All 5 acceptance criteria covered with zero failures.
